title: Link a GPO
description: Welcome to Rank Challenge. The `Desktop Lockdown` GPO exists but is not applied anywhere. Link it to the Sales OU (`OU=Sales,DC=corp,DC=local`) so it takes effect.
hints: New-GPLink attaches a GPO to an OU, site, or domain.
Name the GPO with -Name and the OU with -Target.

files.content:
# TODO: apply the existing lockdown policy to the Sales organizational unit
New-GPO -Name "Desktop Lockdown"

parseRules.failMessage: Point it at the OU with -Target.
